case_title: OPTIMAL DESIGN GROUP VS PITERMAN DMITRY

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PITERMAN DMITRY HEARING SET FOR JUN-14-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,747.06 FILED BY OPTIMAL DESIGN GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT PITERMAN DMITRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-1990 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PITERMAN DMITRY

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPTIMAL DESIGN GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PITERMAN DMITRY $1,747.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,775.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-14-1991, DENIED
